svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Trang-1" id="O3D3A5AzLhvCaop6v24_"> <mxGraphModel dx="1373" dy="821" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
title Chatbot Flow Diagram

|Student|
start
:Start new chat session;
:Send subject question;

|Chatbot System|
:Receive question and request processing;

|System Handler|
:Check Subscription plan & usage limit;
if (Usage limit available?) then (Yes)
 :Search RAG context in documents;
 :Generate response based on documents via LLM;
 |Chatbot System|
 :Format response and citations;
 |Student|
 :View response and citations;
else (No)
 |System Handler|
 :Return usage limit error;
 |Chatbot System|
 :Display limit notification;
 |Student|
 :Receive usage limit exceeded notification;
endif

stop
@enduml
",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="O1Gw5VG5F18bBhAkJVy7-1"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="646" width="1584" x="20" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
title Document Upload Flow Diagram

|Lecturer|
start
:Prepare document (PDF, DOCX, Slide);
:Upload document to system;

|Management System|
:Receive and validate document format;

|System Handler|
:Document chunking & vectorization (RAG Ingestion);
:Save text & vectors to Database & Vector DB;

|Lecturer|
:View current document list;
if (Need to delete old document?) then (Yes)
 :Request document deletion;
 |System Handler|
 :Delete document & associated vectors;
 |Lecturer|
 :Update document list;
else (No)
endif

stop
@enduml
",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="O1Gw5VG5F18bBhAkJVy7-2"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="712" width="872" x="20" y="810" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
title Subscription Flow Diagram

|Student|
start
:Access Subscription page;
:View plan info and benefits (Silver, Gold);
:Select plan and confirm registration/payment;

|Subscription System|
:Initiate transaction and redirect to payment;

|System Handler|
:Verify payment transaction via Webhook/API;
:Update plan tier & account limits in Database;

|Student|
:Use system with new benefit limits;

stop
@enduml
",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="O1Gw5VG5F18bBhAkJVy7-3"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="515" width="924" x="20" y="1540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
title Lecturer Registration & Approval Flow Diagram

|Lecturer|
start
:Access account request page;
:Enter details (Email, Full Name, Department);
:Submit account request;

|System Handler|
:Receive request and validate format;
:Save request in Database with \"Pending\" status;
:Notify Admin of new request;

|Admin|
:View pending request list;
:Review lecturer details;
if (Approve request?) then (Yes)
 :Select Approve and grant role;
 |System Handler|
 :Create Lecturer account in Database;
 :Send success email with credentials;
 |Lecturer|
 :Receive email and log in to system;
else (No)
 |Admin|
 :Enter rejection reason and submit;
 |System Handler|
 :Update request status to \"Rejected\" in Database;
 :Send rejection email with reason;
 |Lecturer|
 :Receive rejection email;
endif

stop
@enduml
",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="O1Gw5VG5F18bBhAkJVy7-4"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="857" width="1587" x="20" y="2080" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
title Authentication & Login Flow Diagram

|User|
start
:Access Login page;
if (Login Method?) then (Email/Password)
 :Enter Email and Password;
 :Submit credentials;
 |System Handler|
 :Hash and verify credentials in Database;
 if (Credentials valid?) then (Yes)
 :Generate JWT Session and Auth Cookie;
 |User|
 :Log in successfully and redirect to dashboard;
 else (No)
 |System Handler|
 :Return login failure error;
 |User|
 :Display error and prompt retry;
 endif
else (Google SSO)
 |User|
 :Click \"Login with Google\";
 :Authenticate account via Google Prompt;
 |System Handler|
 :Receive Google Token and verify with Google API;
 :Check if user exists in Database;
 if (User exists?) then (No)
 :Auto-register new Student account;
 else (Yes)
 endif
 :Generate JWT Session and Auth Cookie;
 |User|
 :Log in successfully and redirect to dashboard;
endif

stop
@enduml
",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="O1Gw5VG5F18bBhAkJVy7-5"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="757" width="1675" x="20" y="2960" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
title Session Management Flow Diagram

|Student|
start
:Request list of past chat sessions;

|System Handler|
:Query Database for sessions matching User ID;
:Return session list with titles;

|Student|
:View session history list on UI;
if (Desired action?) then (Rename session)
 :Enter new name for the session;
 :Confirm rename request;
 |System Handler|
 :Update session title in Database;
 :Return success status;
 |Student|
 :View updated title on the sidebar;
else (Delete session)
 |Student|
 :Click delete session icon;
 :Confirm deletion warning prompt;
 |System Handler|
 :Delete session and all related chat messages;
 :Update session list in Database;
 |Student|
 :View updated sidebar without the deleted session;
endif

stop
@enduml
",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="O1Gw5VG5F18bBhAkJVy7-6"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="698" width="1133" x="20" y="3740" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

g.text: Receive email and log in to system
Save request in Database with "Pending" status
Update request status to "Rejected" in Database

svg.style: width: 1675px; height: 757px; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: initial;
svg.title: Authentication & Login Flow Diagram

g.text: Log in successfully and redirect to dashboard
Log in successfully and redirect to dashboard
Hash and verify credentials in Database
Generate JWT Session and Auth Cookie
Receive Google Token and verify with Google API
Check if user exists in Database
Generate JWT Session and Auth Cookie

svg.style: width: 1133px; height: 698px; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: initial;
svg.title: Session Management Flow Diagram

g.text: Request list of past chat sessions
View session history list on UI
Enter new name for the session
View updated title on the sidebar
View updated sidebar without the deleted session
Query Database for sessions matching User ID
Delete session and all related chat messages
